Dialog.name: MND_LASTWORD_NIGHT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...It's gotten late. I should[n]head back to my room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_LASTWORD_AFTERNOON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...It's almost nighttime. I should[n]head back to my room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}"Lessons in Etiquette"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A quiz with right-or-wrong questions on[n]manners popped up on the screen...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Q: Should you arrive ten minutes early to important meetings?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A: No. You should arrive ten minutes early to all meetings, not just important ones.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}The tricky questions continue...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I finished answering a large[n]number of quiz questions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The manners I learned might make[n]me more attractive and respected...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Now, you too can have a slim body without having to suffer through exercise![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}First, train yourself to curb your appetite by looking at blue food![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looking at all the blue food on-screen[n]is making me lose my appetite...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I finished watching all the videos.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I have a slimmer,[n]more attractive body already...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems to be a game where you[n]talk to 108 different characters.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Love comes in all shapes and sizes! Let's get you hooked up with someone too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I guess it's a love simulation game.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I should try to pick answers that will[n]make the other character happy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I ended up forming a relationship[n]with an aging, 15-year-old dog.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I can effectively convey my[n]charm to just about anyone now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems to be a set of practice questions[n]from a famous school in the mountains.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Whether you're brilliant or average, your journey here begins by answering questions all the same.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I should try some questions in the[n]areas I'm studying right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I finished answering a challenging,[n]yet satisfying set of questions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I've gotten better[n]at thinking outside the box...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are conversational dialogues paired[n]with pictures for overseas travelers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The protagonist wants to go to the airport,[n]but keeps getting distracted on the way...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I watch as they speak with broken[n]grammar to get a discounted burger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Eventually, the protagonist overcame the[n]language barrier and reached the airport.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel more confident in[n]my speaking skills now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With the right training, you can have the mind of a sage! Use these puzzles to train your brain![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Looks like puzzles involving shapes,[n]wordplay, and numbers...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your IQ level is... "Sage Next Door"![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I don't know how to feel about the results.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But, if nothing else, I feel a little[n]smarter after training my brain.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This looks like a game where you play[n]Othello against cutely drawn animals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The elephant begins to bawl[n]after I beat it in Othello...![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I keep playing, and the cute animals[n]continue to weep when they lose...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I managed to make all the[n]animals break into tears.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}They seem to be staring through[n]the screen with big, pitiful puppy eyes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I feel like this experience has[n]strengthened my mental fortitude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like a game where you[n]take down zombies by typing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The zombies are explaining the[n]rules very kindly to me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I don't feel like they're the enemy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decimated the zombies that patiently[n]provided me with a helpful tutorial...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I obtained unwavering[n]mental strength from this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems I can experience the Sengoku[n]period through the eyes of a warlord.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cuckoo bird chose for me. Guess I'll[n]be seeing the life of Tokugawa Ieyasu...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I finished experiencing the[n]eventful life of Ieyasu.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel inspired by the man who unified[n]the country amidst an age of turmoil...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like it teaches skills in customer[n]service, accounting, and product stocking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Improve your skill set! Start with a promotion, end up a billionaire![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A series of easy-to-understand[n]instructions begins to play...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I finished learning about a[n]number of workplace skills.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I can apply this knowledge[n]to my part-time work![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_JOBMANEY_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The amount of money you can earn from part-time jobs has increased.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like a game that[n]simulates raising crops.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Plants don't need "love"—they need appropriate amounts of nutrients and water![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A knowledgeable-seeming dwarf[n]is giving a lecture on agriculture.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I should follow their instructions[n]and adjust the water and fertilizer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was able to produce a bountiful harvest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I learned something tangible[n]about growing vegetables...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_VEGETABLE_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The amount of crops you can harvest from the rooftop planters has increased.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems to be educational software[n]that teaches you about muscles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In this short session, you'll learn 600 ways to use your muscles![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}An immense amount of information[n]is being presented at a rapid pace...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Congratulations! You are hereby promoted to Muscle Sergeant![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I sure learned a lot about[n]how to use my muscles.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I have more stamina[n]now that I've watched this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}"Image Muscle Trainer"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like software that stimulates[n]muscles through image training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Now watch these strength training videos and imagine yourself participating...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I watch the videos and picture[n]myself working out in my head...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For some reason, I feel as exhausted[n]as if I actually did the training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like the image training may have[n]actually strengthened my muscles...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It appears to be software that[n]teaches mindfulness meditation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Even those who have a hard time concentrating will be able to focus their minds with this program.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Lessons on proper breathing[n]and posture begin to play...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My head feels clearer than before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like the meditation has[n]helped me train my mind...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems to teach breathing techniques[n]and stretches at varying difficulty levels.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I follow the on-screen instructions[n]and begin diaphragmatic breathing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was able to reach the final level, where[n]I could hear my true inner thoughts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like this spiritual training[n]has helped me free my mind...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}The Umiushi official website...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}MEMBERS ONLY: Exclusive takeout perks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like if I register, I'll be able[n]to order takeout from Umiushi.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I should enter the membership code[n]from the {f 4 4 1 37 2 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thank you for registering! We hope you enjoy the Umiushi taste in the comfort of your own home![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I've successfully[n]become a registered member.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_UMIUSHIOPEN_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You are now able to order takeout from Umiushi at the Iwatodai strip mall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Let me see what this URL leads to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Iwatodai Forum"... Looks like[n]a message board for locals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The most recently updated topic is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}[[NEW?]] Secret about the vending machine in front of the station[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I'll take a look at this thread...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}anonymous10: when r they gonna fix that vending machine lol[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}anonymous11: wait what's this secret???[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}anonymous14: @anonymous11 you can actually still buy drinks that are marked as sold out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}the machines broken so theres drinks marked sold out when its not.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}just press the button. i recommend the 4biotic pack.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like drinks that are marked[n]as sold out can still be bought.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should try it out on the {f 0 1 2}vending{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 0 1 2}machine in front of Iwatodai Station{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Let me see what this URL leads to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Moonlight Channel"... Looks like an[n]unofficial forum for Gekkoukan High.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Topics include things like, "3rd-years[n]only!" and, "Who do u think is hot?"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like the newest topic is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Anyone try the taiyaki at the school store?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I'll take a look at this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}aaaaaaaaa: never seen this on sale. why is there such a limited amount?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sardine: i saw someone complain to the vendor about this[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Beta: Good news! The taiyaki is gonna be a permanent item now![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I asked about it and apparently there were a lot of requests for it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It sounds like they'll have it in stock daily now![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}TennisLover: wait so we can srsly get it whenevs now???[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oda Nobunaga: ima get one[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like a special {f 0 1 2}taiyaki{f 0 1 27} will[n]be available at the school store.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should take a look[n]next time I'm there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Let me see what this URL leads to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"My Lovely Veggie Garden Blog"...[n]Looks like it's about home gardening.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The blogger seems to have expressed[n]their love by writing entirely in baby talk...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hewwo~ Hab you eber seen a tomato this shoiny!? {f 1 3 139}[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's shooooo pwetty!!! {f 1 3 146} And it's vewy rare. {f 1 3 135}{f 1 3 135}[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Did you know {f 0 1 2}Golden Tomato Sprouts{f 0 1 27} are onwy avaiwable at certain fwower shops!? {f 1 3 145}[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yew can find some at Raffwesia Fwower Shop over at Port Iswand Station! Yaaay!! {f 1 3 136}{f 1 3 146}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like new vegetable seedlings[n]will be available for purchase.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should {f 0 1 2}stop by Rafflesia next{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 0 1 2}time I'm at Port Island Station{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_100_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Let me see what this URL leads to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The "revenge website"... This must[n]be the site from those rumors...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are all kinds of[n]requests posted here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_101_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}[[REDACTED]]: I know he's always talking about me behind my back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hate it. I want revenge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_103_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The hate-filled posts pleading[n]for revenge go on and on...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bearing witness to the ugly side of[n]humanity has strengthened my resolve...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I can't access the site the[n]URL normally leads to...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_105_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems the revenge website[n]has been shut down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should do something[n]else to pass the time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_106_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Let me see what this URL leads to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"The Book of Nyx"... It looks like[n]a site for those who worship Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_107_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The end that frees us from suffering is nigh.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We are all but fools. We perpetuate our own fear and misery, and allow them to control us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But Nyx-sama will show us the way. Nyx-sama will save us all...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems as though the blog hasn't[n]been updated in a little while.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I need to be ready for the fight[n]that awaits us on January 31st...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_194_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Let me see what this URL leads to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Effective Security Measures Online"...[n]This seems to be a website that helps[n]with training security team members...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a list of self-defense videos here,[n]each with a detailed text explanation...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I guess I'll start with the[n]most-watched video...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_196_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I watched a how-to video on[n]subduing violent individuals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned the importance of having[n]the will to stand up to an enemy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I can use what I learned[n]in our fights in Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_170_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You learned how to use {f 0 1 2}Ambush{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_197_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Let me see what this URL leads to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"The Art of Human Demolition"... Looks[n]like it's about the body's weak points.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_198_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Humans know their own weaknesses, and here, we'll explain how to take full advantage of them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_199_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I glance at the smiling mascot character,[n]Demolii-tan, and continue to read...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_200_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I winced a bit, but managed to learn[n]new approaches to hit where it hurts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I've learned how to examine[n]the enemy before making the first strike...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_175_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ambush has been enhanced! When attacking an enemy from behind, you will now inflict Distress without fail.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_201_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Let me see what this URL leads to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Histories of the World's Greatest"...[n]Looks like trivia on historical figures.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_202_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}[[TODAY'S TOPIC]] Leaders in Battle[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_203_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I think I'll read more about this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_204_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I read about the decisions historical[n]leaders made in pursuit of their goals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I've learned how to maintain[n]morale in the face of adversity...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_182_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ambush has been enhanced! After successfully attacking an enemy from behind, your Theurgy gauge will rise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_205_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Let me see what this URL leads to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Ninja Hideout"... It looks like a foreign[n]forum where people post about ninjas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_206_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ninpo: Ninja Research Score, 222[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_207_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Looks like people are serious about[n]becoming real ninjas. I'll take a look...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_208_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}no_ninnin: Ninjas have unique breathing methods, such as "futae-ibuki," "okinaga," and more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_209_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I found interesting breathing techniques[n]that ninjas used for long-distance travel.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I can use this to run[n]swiftly like a ninja myself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_186_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ambush has been enhanced! The amount of time needed to dash before being able to Ambush has been decreased.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_235_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}This site seems to require an "offering."[n]Luckily, the note came with a free pass...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_236_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thank you for the offering, and welcome to the Matchmaking Supershrine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Picture anyone you wish to intensify your relationship with and click the button below.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_237_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Who should I think of...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_251_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I'll think about {f 2 4 0}[n]and click the button...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_252_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I'll think about the monk[n]and click the button...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_269_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I'll think about Bunkichi-san and[n]Mitsuko-san and click the button...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_240_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Praying... Current progress: 3%[n]Continue focusing while you wait.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_241_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The progress bar seems stuck at 3%...[n]I'll continue thinking of {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_254_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The progress bar seems stuck at 3%...[n]I'll continue thinking of the monk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_267_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The progress bar seems stuck at 3%...[n]I'll continue thinking of Bunkichi-san[n]and Mitsuko-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_244_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Prayer complete. Your relationship has intensified.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_243_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems the prayer is done...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Having meditated on our[n]relationship, {f 2 4 0} feels[n]more important to me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_256_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems the prayer is done...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Having meditated on our relationship,[n]the monk feels more important to me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_264_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems the prayer is done...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Having meditated on our relationship,[n]Bunkichi-san and Mitsuko-san feel[n]more important to me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_258_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you would like to ask for another prayer, please purchase another Offering Pass.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_247_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}Let me try the prepaid Offering Pass[n]that came with the URL note again...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_248_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Picture anyone you wish to intensify your relationship with and click the button below.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_249_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Who should I think of...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_259_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Praying... Current progress: 3%[n]Continue focusing while you wait.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_260_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The progress bar seems stuck at 3%...[n]I'll continue thinking of {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_255_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems the prayer is done...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Having meditated on our[n]relationship, {f 2 4 0} feels[n]more important to me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you would like to ask for another prayer, please purchase another Offering Pass.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_164_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}"Intro to Dynamic and Kinetic Visual Acuity"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_165_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Dynamic and kinetic visual acuity is the ability to process moving visual input and react accordingly to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_168_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}...I followed a series of balls and shapes[n]that moved across the screen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel I've become more sensitive[n]to motion in my peripheral vision.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This might be useful when[n]exploring Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_166_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 5 60}I decided to first try the training mode.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_173_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've achieved a high score and[n]survived three lightyears.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel as if I learned the importance of[n]observing an enemy for weak points...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_171_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Simple Shooting Game"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This looks like a game where I[n]shoot down enemies to survive.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hitting the enemies' weak points[n]will destroy them faster.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I look closely, I can see a mark[n]where the enemy's weakness is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_176_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like I have to choose the most[n]positive-sounding phrase out of the group.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_177_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A) "Tastes bad," B) "A unique taste," C) "Not really my thing," D) "Some people might like it."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_178_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 22 0 1 61 25 60}I tried selecting the most[n]positive-sounding one...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_180_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After that, I solved puzzles and[n]got inordinate amounts of praise.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my self-confidence[n]has improved...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_183_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Watch with your eyes, decide with[n]your brain, and move with your body!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems to be a game of rapidly tapping[n]glowing orbs that fly onto the screen...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I couldn't quite keep up, but I stuck[n]with it until I got the hang of it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_184_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was able to get a high score by[n]diligently continuing to play.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel I've gained the ability to[n]react even quicker to things...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_215_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can't think of anyone I want[n]a stronger relationship with...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_220_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Who should I think of...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_222_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think we could get any[n]closer than we already are...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_233_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like the bond I have with[n]{f 2 4 0} has grown stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_265_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like the bond I have with[n]the monk has grown stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_262_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my bond with Bunkichi-san[n]and Mitsuko-san has grown stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_261_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I already used the Offering Pass, but[n]maybe I don't want to do this after all...[n]{f 1 1}
